source_jobs.title: Loyalty Partnerships Manager
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a profitable fintech and travel startup building a next-generation premium banking and rewards ecosystem for affluent customers. With $70M+ in annual revenue and $3B+ in annual transaction volume, we’re entering a new stage of growth focused on scaling our core banking systems, rewards infrastructure, and partner integrations.

We’re seeking a Loyalty Partnerships Manager to source, structure, and manage strategic relationships with airline and hotel partners. This role will play a critical part in expanding and enhancing our rewards platform—ensuring our members have access to best-in-class redemption options and exclusive travel experiences.

You’ll work closely with founders and cross-functional partners across partnerships, product, finance, and operations to build and scale a world-class loyalty network for a high-growth fintech platform.




Your Responsibilities

 - Own and manage relationships with airline and hotel loyalty partners

 - Support negotiation and structuring of partnership agreements, including commercial terms and integrations

 - Collaborate with product and engineering teams to launch and maintain partner integrations

 - Manage ongoing partner performance, identifying opportunities to optimize value for both Taekus and partners

 - Coordinate marketing and promotional initiatives with partners to drive engagement and usage

 - Help develop new partnership opportunities across global travel providers

 - Monitor industry trends across airline and hotel loyalty programs to inform strategy

 - Support expansion of Taekus’s global rewards ecosystem



What We're Looking For

 - 5–10 years of experience in partnerships, business development, or loyalty programs

 - Experience working with airline, hotel, or travel loyalty programs (or adjacent fintech/rewards platforms)

 - Strong understanding of loyalty ecosystems, points economics, and partner structures

 - Experience negotiating and managing external partnerships

 - Ability to manage multiple partner relationships and initiatives simultaneously

 - Strong communication and relationship management skills

 - Analytical mindset with the ability to evaluate partnership performance

 - Builder mindset with the ability to operate in a fast-moving environment
   



You’d Love This Job If

 - You want to build and expand a premium global travel loyalty network

 - You enjoy working directly with external partners and structuring strategic deals

 - You’re excited to operate at the intersection of fintech, travel, and rewards

 - You thrive in high-ownership roles with direct impact on company growth
   



About Taekus

Taekus is a 6-year-old luxury financial services company that offers travel rewards credit cards, debit cards, and other banking services for the affluent market. We currently process $3B+ annually in transactions and operate as a highly profitable company. With a lean team of under 20 employees, we’re undergoing tremendous growth as we redefine the premium banking and rewards experience.



What We Offer

 - Competitive salary and stock option plan

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - 401(k) plan with 5% company match

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Fully remote work environment

source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a profitable fintech and travel startup building a next-generation premium banking and rewards ecosystem for affluent customers. With $70M in annual revenue and $3B+ in annual transaction volume, we’re entering a new stage of growth focused on scaling our core banking systems, rewards infrastructure, and partner integrations.

We’re seeking a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer to help design, build, and scale the core financial and loyalty platforms that power our products. This is a full-stack role with a back-end focus, focused on developing reliable, high-performance services, while occasionally contributing to full-stack features in close collaboration with frontend and mobile engineers.

Join us as we tackle a $3.2T opportunity to redefine the super-premium financial services and rewards market—driving innovation beyond what’s existed since the inception of rewards credit cards


Interview Process

Candidates must be able to travel to San Francisco, New York, Chicago, or Austin for an onsite interview. All required travel will be paid for by Taekus.



Your Responsibilities

 - Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs that support high-volume financial transactions and rewards workflows.

 - Own full feature delivery across core systems including payments, rewards, account services, and partner integrations.

 - Contribute to system architecture and technical design as the platform evolves and scales.

 - Collaborate with frontend and mobile engineers to support end-to-end feature development when fullstack work is required.

 - Improve reliability, performance, and observability across backend systems through testing, monitoring, and code quality practices.

 - Participate in sprint planning, technical reviews, and production support for mission-critical services.



What We're Looking For

 - 6+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a strong backend focus.

 - Production experience building backend systems in Python, ideally using Django.

 - Experience designing APIs, data models, and services using PostgreSQL and AWS.

 - Working knowledge of frontend technologies such as TypeScript and React, with the ability to contribute when needed.

 - Comfort working in distributed systems and high-availability production environments.

 - Strong ownership mindset with the ability to take backend projects from concept through production.

 - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.



You’d Love This Job If

 - You enjoy contributing across the code base where needed.

 - You want to be in a scaling startup that is experiencing exponential growth.

 - You’re excited by building foundational work and enjoy making an impact.

 - Traveling is in your DNA and you get to apply your passion into your work.

 - You thrive in growing high-caliber teams and want to influence both technical and strategic direction.



About Taekus

Taekus is a 6-year-old luxury financial services company that offers travel rewards credit cards, debit cards, and other banking services for the affluent market. We currently process $3B+ annually in transactions and operate as a highly profitable company. With a lean team of under 20 employees, we’re undergoing tremendous growth as we redefine the premium banking and rewards experience.

 



What We Offer

 - Competitive salary and stock option plan

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - 401(k) plan with 5% company match

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Fully remote work environment

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a profitable fintech and travel startup building a next-generation premium banking and rewards ecosystem for affluent customers. With $70M+ in annual revenue and $3B+ in annual transaction volume, we’re entering a new stage of growth focused on scaling our core banking systems, rewards infrastructure, and partner integrations.

We’re seeking a Head of Marketing to define and lead Taekus’s marketing vision—owning product positioning, strategic planning, and execution across all marketing channels. This role will shape how we present our platform to the market, ensuring our brand reflects the premium, design-forward experience we deliver to customers.

You’ll work closely with founders and cross-functional partners across product, design, partnerships, and growth to build a modern marketing organization for a high-growth fintech platform.




Your Responsibilities

 - Own and evolve Taekus’s product positioning and brand strategy across all customer products and touchpoints.

 - Develop and execute a comprehensive marketing strategy aligned with company growth objectives.

 - Lead the planning and execution of integrated marketing campaigns across digital, partnerships, and experiential channels.

 - Partner with product and design teams to ensure cohesive storytelling and premium brand expression.

 - Build and scale customer acquisition, engagement, and retention initiatives.

 - Establish and track key marketing metrics, optimizing performance across channels.

 - Develop strategic partnerships and co-marketing initiatives to expand brand reach.

 - Build and lead the marketing organization as Taekus scales.



What We're Looking For

 - 10+ years in marketing, brand strategy, or growth within consumer, luxury, or fintech environments.

 - Experience leading marketing at a fintech, consumer brand, or premium/luxury product company.

 - Strong understanding of product positioning, brand development, and multi-channel marketing strategy.

 - Proven ability to craft and execute high-impact marketing campaigns.

 - Experience building marketing functions that scale with high-growth companies.

 - Deep appreciation for design, brand, and customer experience.

 - Builder mindset with the ability to operate in a fast-moving environment.

 - Strong cross-functional collaboration with product, design, and leadership teams.
   



You’d Love This Job If

 - You want to define the voice and brand of a next-generation financial platform

 - You enjoy building from zero to one and scaling marketing systems alongside company growth

 - You’re excited to work at the intersection of fintech, luxury, and global travel

 - You thrive in high-ownership roles with direct impact on company strategy
   



About Taekus

Taekus is a luxury financial services company offering premium checking, credit, and debit accounts—paired with an exclusive travel rewards ecosystem. We serve an affluent, global customer base that expects excellence in both experience and execution. With $3B+ in annual transaction volume and strong profitability, we’re redefining what it means to bank beautifully.



What We Offer

 - Competitive salary and stock option plan

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - 401(k) plan with 5% company match

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Fully remote work environment

source_jobs.title: Head of Credit
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a profitable fintech and travel startup building a next-generation premium banking and rewards ecosystem for affluent customers. With $70M+ in annual revenue and $3B+ in annual transaction volume, we’re entering a new stage of growth focused on scaling our core banking systems, rewards infrastructure, and partner integrations.

We’re entering the next phase of growth and are looking for a Head of Credit to architect and scale the credit infrastructure behind our products.

As the Head of Credit, you will own the end-to-end credit strategy at Taekus—from underwriting architecture and risk models to portfolio performance and new credit product design. This is a foundational leadership role responsible for building the credit engine behind a new generation of premium financial products.

You’ll work closely with the founders, product, data, and finance teams to design scalable underwriting systems that enable growth while maintaining disciplined portfolio performance.



Your Responsibilities

 - Own Taekus’s credit strategy and underwriting framework

 - Design and scale credit decisioning infrastructure and risk models
   Monitor and optimize portfolio performance across approval rates, delinquencies, and losses

 - Partner with product and data teams to build automated underwriting and risk systems

 - Launch and manage new credit products within the Taekus ecosystem

 - Work closely with sponsor banks and compliance partners to ensure regulatory alignment

 - Build and lead the credit risk and underwriting organization



What We're Looking For

 - 10+ years in consumer credit, underwriting, or credit risk leadership

 - Experience building or scaling credit programs at a fintech, card issuer, or modern bank

 - Strong background in credit modeling, underwriting strategy, and portfolio management

 - Experience working with credit bureau data, alternative underwriting signals, and automated decisioning

 - Builder mindset with the ability to operate in a fast-moving fintech environment

 - Strong product and data partnership instincts



You’d Love This Job If

 - You want to architect the credit foundation of a new premium banking platform

 - You like to work on products at the intersection of fintech, payments, and global travel

 - You’re looking for a high ownership role with direct impact on company strategy



About Taekus
Taekus is a luxury financial services company offering premium checking, credit, and debit accounts—paired with an exclusive travel rewards ecosystem. We serve an affluent, global customer base that expects excellence in both experience and execution. With $3B+ in annual transaction volume and strong profitability, we’re redefining what it means to bank beautifully.



What We Offer

 - Competitive salary and stock option plan

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - 401(k) plan with 5% company match

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Fully remote work environment

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer,  Flights and Loyalty
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a fintech and travel startup building a next generation premium financial services brand. As a profitable fintech with a $70M revenue/yr and new carrier partnerships, we’re entering a new stage of growth—significant expansion of our loyalty engine.

We’re seeking a flights focused full-stack or backend engineer to help scale our flight routing & booking engine. This includes working with airline loyalty programs to build our partnerships out for flight search and booking. You will be joining our resident flights expert in shaping the Flights & Loyalty team.

Help us tackle this $3.2T opportunity to innovate in the true super-premium market since the inception of rewards credit cards.

Interview Process

Candidates must be able to travel to San Francisco, New York, Chicago, or Austin for an onsite interview. All required travel will be paid for by Taekus.

Your Responsibilities

 - Driving Core Feature Delivery: Taking ownership of major feature releases across the entire flight booking funnel, from flight search to booking creation and post-booking fulfillment.

 - Building logic for award ticket inventory pricing & point transferring to our partners.

 - Integrating with external airlines and GDS partners and navigating their complex communication protocols and data schemas.

What You Bring to the Table

 - 6+ years of engineering experience, most recently writing production-grade Python

 - Experience with GDS systems, such as Amadeus or Sabre

 - Technical experience in: Python / Django, TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, AWS.

 - You’re into credit card points/travel hacking and book yourself many flights with points — and you can play all those pesky airline rewards search engines like an instrument.

 - You’ve considered building your own flight inventory scrapers, have multiple credit cards, and have history with FlyerTalk

You'd Love This Job If

 - You want to be in a scaling startup that is experiencing exponential growth.

 - You’re excited by building foundational work and enjoy making an impact.

 - Traveling is in your DNA and you get to apply your passion into your work.

 - You thrive in growing high-caliber teams and want to influence both technical and strategic direction.

About Taekus

Taekus is a 6-year-old luxury financial services company offering premium checking, credit, and debit accounts—paired with an exclusive travel rewards ecosystem. We serve an affluent, global customer base that expects excellence in both experience and execution. With $3B+ in annual transaction volume and strong profitability, we’re redefining what it means to bank beautifully.

What We Offer

 - Competitive salary and stock option plan

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - 401(k) plan with 5% company match

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Fully remote work environment

source_jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Taekus is a profitable fintech and travel startup building a next-generation premium banking and rewards ecosystem for affluent customers. With $70M in annual revenue and $3B+ in annual transaction volume, we're entering a new stage of growth focused on scaling our core banking systems, rewards infrastructure, and partner integrations.



We're seeking a Senior Platform Engineer to own the infrastructure, reliability, and security that everything we build runs on. This is a high-autonomy role for an engineer ready to define a function from the ground up—setting technical direction, taking work from concept through production, and growing into broader technical leadership as we scale.



Join us as we tackle a $3.2T opportunity to redefine the super-premium financial services and rewards market—driving innovation beyond what's existed since the inception of rewards credit cards


Interview Process

Candidates must be able to travel to San Francisco, New York, Chicago, or Austin for an onsite interview. All required travel will be paid for by Taekus.

 

Your Responsibilities

 - Own and unify the platform and infrastructure that powers our core products and services, driving toward infrastructure-as-code over time.

 - Treat our engineers as your customers—build the tooling, paved roads, and self-service workflows that let them ship quickly and safely.

 - Own CI/CD and release automation, keeping the path to production fast, reliable, and observable.

 - Own feature-flag, configuration, and secrets infrastructure, along with the reliability of our background-job, caching, and queue systems (Celery, Redis, RabbitMQ).

 - Improve observability and operational health across services through structured logging, error monitoring, and APM, and share in the on-call rotation for platform and infrastructure services.

 - Own the platform's security guardrails—secrets management, IAM and access control, PCI/PII data handling, and vulnerability management.

 - Own and automate compliance and audit readiness (PCI-DSS, SOC 2, partner security reviews), coordinating external auditors and making the process repeatable.

 

What We're Looking For

 - 6+ years of professional engineering experience, with a strong platform, infrastructure, or backend focus.

 - Deep, hands-on AWS experience (EKS/Kubernetes, EC2, Lambda, RDS) in high-availability production environments.

 - Strong CI/CD and release-engineering background, with containerization using Docker and Kubernetes, and a track record of building tooling that improves developer experience (Terraform a plus).

 - Comfort working in a Python/Django codebase (Celery, Redis, PostgreSQL), able to read and contribute to platform code.

 - Experience with modern observability and monitoring tooling across logging, error tracking, and APM.

 - A security-minded engineer, ideally with hands-on PCI-DSS or SOC 2 experience.

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.

 

You’d Love This Job If

 - You want to establish and own a platform from the ground up.

 - You'd rather automate security and compliance than grind through them by hand.

 - You enjoy contributing across the code base where needed.

 - You want to be in a scaling startup that is experiencing exponential growth.

 - You're excited by building foundational work and enjoy making an impact.

 - Traveling is in your DNA and you get to apply your passion into your work.

 - You thrive in growing high-caliber teams and want to influence both technical and strategic direction.

 

About Taekus

Taekus is a 6-year-old luxury financial services company that offers travel rewards credit cards, debit cards, and other banking services for the affluent market. We currently process $3B+ annually in transactions and operate as a highly profitable company. With a lean team of under 20 employees, we’re undergoing tremendous growth as we redefine the premium banking and rewards experience.

 
 

What We

notes: Fintech and travel startup with a mix of tech and non-tech roles
